message:
✨ Add subscriber patterns to all cache systems for unified demo mode switching (#704)

Adds cache reset notification patterns to workloads, events, storage, networking,
and helm caches so hooks re-render with skeleton display when caches are cleared
during demo mode toggle.

- workloads.ts: Add WorkloadsSharedState, notifyWorkloadsSubscribers, subscribeWorkloadsCache
- events.ts: Add EventsSharedState, notifyEventsSubscribers, subscribeEventsCache
- storage.ts: Add StorageSharedState, notifyStorageSubscribers, subscribeStorageCache
- networking.ts: Add NetworkingSharedState, notifyNetworkingSubscribers, subscribeNetworkingCache
- helm.ts: Add isLoading to HelmReleasesCacheState, notify with isLoading: true on reset

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
